label: Watchtower
worldEffect: A raised post over the barricade, where a lookout can keep watch.
description: Installs room.watchtower — halves off-screen barricade decay passively (a lookout slows the rot, PL-M3-05) AND unlocks job.watch (post a resident to actively keep the wall up). Buildable in the bare shelter (FR-SHL-04).
